chapter_title.en: Encouraging virtue through kindness and benevolence

text: ١٥٨. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): عَاتِبْ أَخَاكَ بِالْإِحْسَانِ إِلَيْهِ، وَارْدُدْ شَرَّهُ بِالْإِنْعَامِ عَلَيْهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 158. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: Admonish your brother (comrade) by good behaviour towards him, and ward off his evil by favouring him. [1]
